task.label: Ensure that applicants undergo a medical examination

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: does not apply to category AM unless required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)
for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, alternative measures may be applied instead

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is issued for the first time

exception.description: does not apply to category AM unless required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)
for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, alternative measures may be applied instead

task.label: Undergo a medical examination for categories C, CE, C1, C1E, D, D1, DE or D1E

conditions.condition: regardless of whether a medical examination was undertaken for another category

task.label: Undergo a medical examination for renewal

conditions.condition: before a driving licence is renewed

exception.description: does not apply to category AM unless required by the Member State in accordance with Article 10(1), point (b)
for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE, alternative measures may be applied instead

task.label: Require applicant to fill in a self-assessment form

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III
instead of requiring a medical examination
if required by the Member State
when applying for the issuance or renewal of a driving licence

task.label: Establish a national system of assessment of fitness to drive

conditions.condition: for categories AM, A, A1, A2, B, B1 and BE
to the extent not otherwise provided for by Annex III
instead of requiring a medical examination

task.label: Provide for measures to address non-compliance with self-assessment requirements
Apply alternative measure allowing monitoring of fitness to drive during periods of administrative validity
Ensure that applicant or holder undergoes a medical examination prior to issuing or renewing the driving licence

conditions.condition: if, on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the alternative measures set out in paragraph 3, it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III

task.label: Undergo a medical examination prior to issuance or renewal of driving licence

conditions.condition: if, on the basis of information acquired pursuant to the alternative measures set out in paragraph 3, it becomes apparent that the applicant or holder is likely to have one or more of the medical conditions listed in Annex III

task.label: Take measures to raise awareness and improve knowledge about minimum standards of fitness for driving
Inform the Commission about adopted guidelines

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines for medical practitioners to help identify driving licence holders who no longer meet minimum standards of fitness to drive

task.label: Make guidelines available to other Member States

conditions.condition: if Member States adopt guidelines and inform the Commission thereof

task.label: Inform the Commission about public awareness campaigns

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns to inform citizens about health conditions that may impair fitness to drive

task.label: Make information available to other Member States

conditions.condition: if Member States develop public awareness campaigns and inform the Commission thereof

task.label: Set stricter standards than those in Annex III
